problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of BDNF. BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
